title: data_query
description: Run a read-only SQL SELECT query against a SQLite database and return result rows.

query.description: SQL SELECT statement to execute. Only read queries are permitted.

database.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Must be in allowed sources.

params.description: Positional query parameters (? placeholders) to bind safely.

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows to return (default 1000).
